limits_raw_10_honest: perceval SLOS = ideal noiseless strong-simulation Fock backend; NOT real photonic hardware (Xanadu X-series / Quandela Ascella required for Phase 2)

strawberryfields was the primary SDK candidate but blocked: scipy 1.17 (only py3.14 wheel) removed scipy.integrate.simps while sf 0.23.0 still imports it; scipy<1.14 has no py3.14 wheel and source-build fails — fell back to perceval-quandela 1.1.0
cutoff_dim=4 truncates Fock space; |1,1,0,0> 5-stage BS cascade max occupation = 2 so cutoff 4 is non-binding here, but real-hardware non-Gaussian states would saturate fast
4-mode POC covers 2 of 8 substrate platforms (with sibling quantum); neuromorphic/fpga/cmos/memristor/superconducting/analog still TODO
substrate_backend enum = design only this cycle; physics.hexa photonic_engine() stub unmodified (isolated POC proof, sibling C boundary respected)
photon-number Shannon entropy is a Φ-relevant proxy (Fock-basis distribution diversity) but NOT IIT Φ proper — same caveat as sibling quantum bipartition entropy
raw#9 strict respected via exec(awk/sha/python3); helper script is raw#37 transient (main-only, no library)
